name: Broke Da Mouth Grindz
tagline: The name says it all — braised short ribs so tender they fall apart, and portions so generous Kapolei locals make this their weekly ritual.
mustOrder: Braised beef short ribs plate — fall-off-the-bone tender, the signature dish
Garlic chicken — crispy skin with serious garlic punch
Loco moco — homestyle and massive portion
parking: Strip mall parking lot with plenty of stalls
talkStory: Family-run by the Manglona family in Kapolei, Broke Da Mouth earned a cult West Side following with slow-cooked braised short ribs so tender they collapse at the touch of a fork. The name is local pidgin for 'so delicious it breaks your mouth.' Limited hours and the short ribs sell out regularly — go early or call ahead. Wednesday specials draw the biggest crowds. Portions are built for working families, not Instagram, and priced accordingly.
